Company.title: Company
Company.description: Represents a single shipping company tenant in the system.

name.description: The legal name of the shipping company.

contactEmail.description: Primary contact email for the company.

Announcement.title: Announcement
Announcement.description: Represents a public advisory or announcement for a specific company.

content.description: The main body of the announcement.

category.description: The category of the announcement (e.g., 'Weather Update', 'Route Change').

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the announcement was created.

Port.title: Port
Port.description: Represents a port operated by a specific company.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Port entity.

location.description: The location of the port (e.g., city, country).

Passenger.title: Passenger
Passenger.description: Represents a passenger using the system. Passenger profiles are global but their bookings are tenant-specific.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Passenger entity (matches user UID).

firstName.description: The first name of the passenger.

lastName.description: The last name of the passenger.

email.description: The email address of the passenger.

phone.description: The phone number of the passenger.

familyMembers.description: A list of family members associated with this passenger account.

id.description: A unique identifier for the family member within the account.

Ship.title: Ship
Ship.description: Represents a ship belonging to a specific company.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Ship entity.

capacity.description: The maximum passenger capacity of the ship.

status.description: The current status of the ship (e.g., 'In Service', 'Under Maintenance').

AdminUser.title: AdminUser
AdminUser.description: Represents an administrative user or staff member for a specific company.

uid.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the user.

companyId.description: The ID of the company this user belongs to.

companyName.description: Denormalized name of the company for display.

email.description: The email address associated with the user's account.

name.description: The name of the staff member.

roles.description: A list of roles assigned to the user within their company.

assignedShipId.description: The ID of the ship the staff member is assigned to.

assignedShipName.description: The denormalized name of the assigned ship.

assignedPortId.description: The ID of the port the staff member is assigned to.

assignedPortName.description: The denormalized name of the assigned port.

Route.title: Route
Route.description: Represents a route operated by a specific company.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Route entity.

distance.description: The distance of the route (e.g. in miles or kilometers).

passengerTypes.description: A list of passenger types available for this route.

Fare.title: Fare
Fare.description: Represents a fare for a specific route and passenger type for a company.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Fare entity.

routeId.description: Reference to a Route within the same company.

routeName.description: Denormalized name of the route for display purposes.

passengerType.description: The type of passenger for this fare.

Schedule.title: Schedule
Schedule.description: Represents a scheduled trip for a company. Can be a 'Daily' recurring template or a one-time 'Special' trip.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Schedule entity.

tripType.description: The type of trip schedule: Daily (template) or Special (one-time).

sourceScheduleId.description: If this is a 'Special' trip spawned from a 'Daily' template, this is the ID of the original template.

shipId.description: Reference to Ship within the same company.

shipName.description: Denormalized name of the ship for display purposes.

routeId.description: Reference to Route within the same company.

departurePortName.description: Denormalized name of the departure port for authorization.

date.description: The date of the scheduled trip (for 'Special' trips).

availableSeats.description: The number of seats available on this scheduled trip.

status.description: The real-time status of the trip.

boardingStatus.description: The boarding status of the trip.

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: Represents a passenger booking for a specific company's trip.

passengerInfo.description: Array of passenger details for the booking.

passengerEmail.description: Primary contact email for the booking.

passengerPhone.description: Primary contact phone number for the booking.

scheduleId.description: Reference to Schedule within the same company.

fareDetails.description: Breakdown of fares used in the booking.

routeName.description: Denormalized name of the route for display purposes.

departurePortName.description: Denormalized name of the departure port for authorization.

bookingDate.description: The date the booking was made.

numberOfSeats.description: The total number of seats booked.

totalPrice.description: The total price of the booking.

status.description: The reservation status of the booking.

paymentStatus.description: The payment status of the booking.

paymentMethod.description: The payment method used for the booking.

refundStatus.description: The refund status of a cancelled booking.

refundAmount.description: The amount refunded to the customer.

rebookingHistory.description: A history of rebooking fees applied to this booking.

noShowFee.description: Fee applied if the passenger is a no-show.

MaintenanceRecord.title: MaintenanceRecord
MaintenanceRecord.description: Represents a maintenance record for a specific company's ship.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MaintenanceRecord entity.

shipId.description: Reference to Ship within the same company.

startDate.description: The start date of the maintenance period.

endDate.description: The end date of the maintenance period.

Boarding.title: Boarding
Boarding.description: Represents the boarding status of a passenger for a specific company's trip.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Boarding record.

bookingId.description: Reference to Booking within the same company.

scheduleId.description: Reference to Schedule within the same company.

boardingTime.description: The timestamp when the passenger boarded.

definition.description: Stores top-level information about each tenant company.
Stores administrative user information and roles for all companies. Document ID is the user's Firebase UID.
Stores global passenger profiles. A passenger can book trips with multiple companies.
Stores public announcements for a specific company.
Stores port information for a specific company.
Stores ship information for a specific company.
Stores route information for a specific company.
Stores fare information for a specific company.
Stores schedule information for a specific company.
Stores booking information for a specific company.
Stores maintenance records for a specific company's ships.
Stores real-time boarding records for a specific company's trips.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore data structure has been re-architected to support a multi-tenant SaaS model. A top-level 'companies' collection is introduced. All operational data (ships, routes, bookings, etc.) is now nested within a specific company's document, ensuring strict data isolation. Global collections like 'staff' and 'passengers' are kept at the root, with staff documents containing a 'companyId' field to link them to their respective tenant. This allows for secure, scalable, and independent management for each shipping company using the platform.
